productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue & White T-shirt
description: Style NoteTake stylish dressing to the next level with this T-shirt from united colors of benetton. The stripes of colour give a burst of energy, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this tee with denims and sneakers for casual Fridays and for casual outings.Product DetailsBlue and white horizontal striped T-shirt, round neck with a four buttoned placket, has short sleeves and a straight hem.Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryDo not dry cleanSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
